name: GoChat
description: Custom chat backend. Local mode (built-in API, zero config) or relay mode (GoChat platform via WebSocket). Supports text, images, audio, video, and file attachments.

mode.description: local: built-in API server; relay: WebSocket relay via GoChat platform (default)

webhookSecret.description: Webhook signing secret (auto-generated for local mode)

directPort.description: Port for local mode HTTP server (default: 9750)

trustedAttachmentHosts.description: Extra trusted hosts for inbound attachment downloads. The relay host is trusted automatically.

channelId.description: Channel ID from GoChat relay platform (auto-registered)
